task_completion.description: Mark the 'src' folder as Sources Root.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Project tool window or Project Structure dialog, the 'src' folder is marked with a blue folder icon indicating it is a Sources Root.

task_completion.description: Mark the 'test' folder as Test Sources Root.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Project tool window or Project Structure dialog, the 'test' folder is marked with a green folder icon indicating it is a Test Sources Root.

task_completion.description: Mark the 'config' folder as Resources Root.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Project tool window or Project Structure dialog, the 'config' folder is marked with a resource folder icon (typically a folder with a small icon overlay or purple/yellow color depending on the theme) indicating it is a Resources Root.

task_completion.description: Add all JAR files in the 'lib' folder as project dependencies.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Project Structure -> Modules -> Dependencies tab, or in the Project tool window under 'External Libraries', the JAR files from the 'lib' folder (commons-lang3, junit, hamcrest-core) are listed as dependencies.

task_completion.description: Resolve all 'Cannot resolve symbol' errors in the code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The code editor shows no red squiggly lines under the code, and the top right corner of the editor shows a green checkmark indicating no syntax or resolution errors.

task_completion.description: Successfully build the project to generate the compiled class files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'out/production/LegacyInventory/com/inventory/Main.class' file is visible in the Project tool window, or the Build tool window shows a 'Build completed successfully' message.

integrity.description: The agent used the IntelliJ IDEA GUI to configure the project structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Project Structure' dialog open, or right-click context menus being used on folders in the Project tool window, rather than terminal commands editing .iml files.

integrity.description: The project was built using IntelliJ IDEA's build system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Build Output' tool window is visible showing the build process, or the IDE's 'Build Project' action (hammer icon) was clicked, rather than using 'javac' in the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not delete the code to resolve the errors.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Java source files still contain the original code (e.g., imports and usages of external libraries) but without the red error highlights.
